channel.title: Whamcloud Community JIRA
channel.description: This file is an XML representation of an issue

item.title: [LU-19213] ost-pools test_29: spilling on test_29-1 is off
item.description:
This issue was created by maloo for Chakshu Kansal <ckansal@ddn.com>

This issue relates to the following test suite run: https://testing.whamcloud.com/test_sets/319d7464-b0f9-45c6-9faf-50c8b7d28d2d

test_29 failed with the following error:

spilling on test_29-1 is off

Test session details:
clients: https://build.whamcloud.com/job/lustre-reviews/115009 - 4.18.0-553.58.1.el8_10.x86_64
servers: https://build.whamcloud.com/job/lustre-reviews/115009 - 4.18.0-553.58.1.el8_lustre.x86_64

error: invalid path 'test_29-1': No such file or directory
CMD: trevis-107vm1,trevis-107vm2 /usr/sbin/lctl get_param -n lod.lustre-MDT0000-mdtlov.pool.test_29-1.spill_is_active
trevis-107vm2: error: get_param: param_path 'lod/lustre-MDT0000-mdtlov/pool/test_29-1/spill_is_active': No such file or directory
pdsh@trevis-78vm4: trevis-107vm2: ssh exited with exit code 2
CMD: trevis-107vm1,trevis-107vm2 /usr/sbin/lctl get_param -n lod.lustre-MDT0000-mdtlov.pool.test_29-1.spill_is_active
trevis-107vm2: error: get_param: param_path 'lod/lustre-MDT0000-mdtlov/pool/test_29-1/spill_is_active': No such file or directory
pdsh@trevis-78vm4: trevis-107vm2: ssh exited with exit code 2
0
 ost-pools test_29: @@@@@@ FAIL: spilling on test_29-1 is off 
  Trace dump:
  = /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/test-framework.sh:7348:error()
  = /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/ost-pools.sh:1726:test_29()
  = /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/test-framework.sh:7725:run_one()
  = /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/test-framework.sh:7788:run_one_logged()
  = /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/test-framework.sh:7602:run_test()
  = /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/ost-pools.sh:1771:main()
Dumping lctl log to /autotest/autotest-2/2025-07-14/lustre-reviews_review-dne-part-6_115009_31_28bd6af2-079b-4fce-8aae-d7044f7a1261//ost-pools.test_29.*.1752493695.log
CMD: trevis-107vm1,trevis-107vm2,trevis-73vm4,trevis-78vm4.trevis.whamcloud.com,trevis-78vm5 /usr/sbin/lctl dk > /autotest/autotest-2/2025-07-14/lustre-reviews_review-dne-part-6_115009_31_28bd6af2-079b-4fce-8aae-d7044f7a1261//ost-pools.test_29.debug_log.\$(hostname -s).1752493695.log;
		dmesg > /autotest/autotest-2/2025-07-14/lustre-reviews_review-dne-part-6_115009_31_28bd6af2-079b-4fce-8aae-d7044f7a1261//ost-pools.test_29.dmesg.\$(hostname -s).1752493695.log
CMD: trevis-107vm1 /usr/sbin/lctl set_param lod.lustre-MDT0000-mdtlov.pool.test_29-1.spill_threshold_pct=0
lod.lustre-MDT0000-mdtlov.pool.test_29-1.spill_threshold_pct=0
Destroy the created pools: test_29-1,test_29-2
CMD: trevis-107vm1 /usr/sbin/lctl pool_list lustre
lustre.test_29-1
CMD: trevis-107vm1 /usr/sbin/lctl pool_list lustre.test_29-1
CMD: trevis-107vm1 lctl pool_remove lustre.test_29-1 lustre-OST0000_UUID
trevis-107vm1: OST lustre-OST0000_UUID removed from pool lustre.test_29-1
CMD: trevis-107vm1 lctl pool_remove lustre.test_29-1 lustre-OST0001_UUID
trevis-107vm1: OST lustre-OST0001_UUID removed from pool lustre.test_29-1
CMD: trevis-107vm1 lctl pool_list lustre.test_29-1 | wc -l
CMD: trevis-107vm1 lctl pool_destroy lustre.test_29-1
trevis-107vm1: Pool lustre.test_29-1 destroyed
CMD: trevis-107vm1 lctl get_param -n lod.lustre-MDT0000-mdtlov.pools.test_29-1 				2>/dev/null || echo foo
CMD: trevis-107vm2 lctl get_param -n lod.lustre-MDT0001-mdtlov.pools.test_29-1 				2>/dev/null || echo foo
CMD: trevis-107vm1 lctl get_param -n lod.lustre-MDT0002-mdtlov.pools.test_29-1 				2>/dev/null || echo foo
CMD: trevis-78vm4.trevis.whamcloud.com lctl get_param -n lov.lustre-*.pools.test_29-1 		2>/dev/null || echo foo
CMD: trevis-107vm1 /usr/sbin/lctl pool_list lustre
lustre.test_29-2
CMD: trevis-107vm1 /usr/sbin/lctl pool_list lustre.test_29-2
CMD: trevis-107vm1 lctl pool_remove lustre.test_29-2 lustre-OST0002_UUID
trevis-107vm1: OST lustre-OST0002_UUID removed from pool lustre.test_29-2
CMD: trevis-107vm1 lctl pool_remove lustre.test_29-2 lustre-OST0003_UUID
trevis-107vm1: OST lustre-OST0003_UUID removed from pool lustre.test_29-2
CMD: trevis-107vm1 lctl pool_list lustre.test_29-2 | wc -l
CMD: trevis-107vm1 lctl pool_destroy lustre.test_29-2
trevis-107vm1: Pool lustre.test_29-2 destroyed
CMD: trevis-107vm1 lctl get_param -n lod.lustre-MDT0000-mdtlov.pools.test_29-2 				2>/dev/null || echo foo
CMD: trevis-107vm2 lctl get_param -n lod.lustre-MDT0001-mdtlov.pools.test_29-2 				2>/dev/null || echo foo
CMD: trevis-107vm1 lctl get_param -n lod.lustre-MDT0002-mdtlov.pools.test_29-2 				2>/dev/null || echo foo
CMD: trevis-78vm4.trevis.whamcloud.com lctl get_param -n lov.lustre-*.pools.test_29-2 		2>/dev/null || echo foo

VVVVVVV DO NOT REMOVE LINES BELOW, Added by Maloo for auto-association VVVVVVV
ost-pools test_29 - spilling on test_29-1 is off
item.summary: ost-pools test_29: spilling on test_29-1 is off

status.description: The issue is open and ready for the assignee to start work on it.
